meta_title: For Students: debugging with AI to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Students: Debugging with AI to Solve Stuck Projects
content.seo_description: Learn how to debug with AI and overcome developer blocks. An intermediate-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate your coding workflow.
content.answer_block: Move past basic roadblocks by integrating AI agents into your development lifecycle. By using Antigravity to architect logic and Claude Code to perform iterative debugging, you transform frustrating errors into learning opportunities, effectively shrinking the gap between a broken prototype and a production-ready application for your portfolio.
content.intro:
You’ve passed the tutorial phase, but now you’re staring at a blank terminal, trapped in a cycle of 'undefined is not a function' errors. It’s the dreaded intermediate plateau where the complexity of real-world apps begins to outweigh your current experience. You feel the weight of every bug, wondering if you have what it takes to ship.

But the paradigm has shifted. You aren't just a coder anymore; you are an AI-augmented architect. By leveraging advanced tooling, you can offload the cognitive load of syntax errors and focus on the high-level logic that actually defines a senior developer's skill set. Let’s break through the wall.

steps.title: Isolate the Logic Failure
steps.description: Stop staring at the whole codebase. Use AI to identify the exact module causing the cascading failure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase and identify the core function causing the current runtime exception. Map the data flow and pinpoint where the state becomes corrupted.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file-path src/core/engine.ts --task 'Find the root cause of the current runtime crash'

steps.title: Generate Unit Test Harnesses
steps.description: Create a safety net around your buggy code so you can refactor with confidence.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of Jest unit tests for this module that covers edge cases, null values, and asynchronous race conditions.

steps.title: Refactor for Observability
steps.description: Inject structured logging and error handling so the code tells you exactly what is wrong.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this function to include structured logging and comprehensive try-catch blocks that preserve stack traces.

steps.title: Simulate Production Environment
steps.description: Use AI to mock external API dependencies that are causing your local testing to fail.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a mock server configuration for this API integration to simulate 500-level errors and latency.

steps.title: Automate the Debug Loop
steps.description: Run an automated loop where the AI executes the code, captures the error, and applies a fix.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform an iterative fix: analyze the error output, modify the source code, and re-run the test suite until all tests pass.

pro_tips: Always define a 'source of truth' schema in your context window before asking for code fixes to prevent hallucinations.
Treat your AI agent like a junior developer: provide the error stack trace, not just the code block.
Use Claude Code to generate 'ADRs' (Architecture Decision Records) so you remember why you chose a specific fix later.
When debugging, ask the AI to explain the 'why' behind the fix to ensure you are actually learning the underlying pattern.
Limit your context window to only the relevant files to keep the AI's reasoning sharp and focused.
content.next_steps: Document your fix in your project README, push your changes to GitHub, and start a new feature branch to apply these same debugging patterns to a fresh module.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools, the strategy, and the roadmap to move from a stuck student to a capable AI builder. The industry is waiting for your portfolio to shine. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
